goal: Enable custom user-defined tags in the community post composer while keeping the existing recommended tag choices and current publishing flow intact.
constraints: Do not modify community feed, sorting, filtering, or post detail behavior beyond what is required for composer tag entry.
Keep the existing recommended category tag chips available; add custom tag input in addition to them.
Respect the current tag validation limits: maximum 5 tags total and maximum 20 characters per tag.
Limit code changes to the community composer and directly related task records.
deliverables: Community composer supports adding custom tags entered by the user.
Existing preset tag chips remain usable alongside custom tags.
Composer prevents duplicate tags and respects the existing max-tag constraints.
Project checks for the touched files pass after the change.
